title: A Straw Hat Refuses to Fall
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on a straw hat refuses to fall, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: A Straw Hat Refuses to Fall. Nami begins turning Usopp’s flawed invention into a weapon suited to her intelligence and weather sense. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Hmm... So you're not a complete novice.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: That I felt like I came across something bad in the Clima-Tact manual just back a moment ago...

dialogue.speaker: Miss Doublefinger
dialogue.text: The above-listed techniques are a surefire way to kick things off at parties and entertain people!

dialogue.speaker: Miss Doublefinger
dialogue.text: for the list of combat- techniques, please!Flip to the otherwise of this manual.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Oh, I wonder where my lil' kitty has run off to this time?

dialogue.speaker: Alabasta rebel
dialogue.text: Despite my looks, I'll have you know I was a former thief,

dialogue.speaker: Miss Doublefinger
dialogue.text: Who, during her 8 long years of thieving,

dialogue.speaker: Miss Doublefinger
dialogue.text: Has survived countless of life or death situations all alone!

dialogue.speaker: Miss Doublefinger
dialogue.text: For being treated like a little girl!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: So what's with the sudden confidence?

dialogue.speaker: Miss Doublefinger
dialogue.text: Rule No. 1 in using the China-Tact for combat: Know the functions of each of the 3 Facts.

dialogue.speaker: Miss Doublefinger
dialogue.text: I'll be fighting for real now!

dialogue.speaker: Miss Doublefinger
dialogue.text: By swinging or blowing on each Tact, you can shoot special bubbles!

dialogue.speaker: Miss Doublefinger
dialogue.text: While the third shoots electric bubbles.

summary: This part develops a straw hat refuses to fall and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
